 {"id":"frankenredis-xf0u","title":"Add keyspace hit/miss counters to Store","description":"# Add keyspace_hits and keyspace_misses counters to Store

## What
Add two new pub u64 fields to Store: stat_keyspace_hits and stat_keyspace_misses.
Increment them in the appropriate access paths.

## Where to add counters
- stat_keyspace_hits: incremented when a key lookup succeeds (get, hget, etc.)
- stat_keyspace_misses: incremented when a key lookup returns None/not-found

## Key implementation points
- Add fields to Store struct (fr-store/src/lib.rs, near line 722)
- Initialize to 0 in Store::new()
- Increment in Store::get(), Store::exists(), and other read paths that check key existence
- The tricky part: many commands call internal store methods that don't distinguish hit vs miss at the Store level. The cleanest approach is to add an internal helper that records the hit/miss after any key-existence check.
- Do NOT add counters inside every individual command — add them at the Store method level where key lookups happen.

## Why this matters
- INFO stats reports keyspace_hits:0 and keyspace_misses:0 — monitoring tools use these for cache hit ratio calculations
- Redis OBJECT FREQ uses hit frequency; while we don't implement LFU, the counters enable future LFU eviction
- Conformance: redis-benchmark and redis-stat rely on these counters

## Testing
- Unit test: call get() on existing and non-existing keys, verify counters
- Conformance: INFO stats section should show non-zero keyspace_hits after operations

## Files to modify
- crates/fr-store/src/lib.rs (Store struct + access methods)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:17:39.401966588Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-03T00:33:11.797925771Z","closed_at":"2026-04-03T00:33:11.797663715Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
